content:
Undertaking for Custom Bid Creation on GeM
File number: - TENDER FOR "LSTK Contract for CDU-3 F-101 Crude Heater Revamp Job" at BPCL
Mumbai Refinery
CRFQ NO-1000454616
Date: 08.04.2026
Subject: Undertaking for Creation of Custom Bid for Services required on GeM
1. Services Required (Please specify the exact goods / services required):
Supply and Installation of New CAPH & GA
Revamp of radiant section
SOR Jobs for heater miscellaneous works
2. Search String Used in the GeM Availability Report & Past Transaction Summary (Please state the
exact search string used to find suitable categories):
1. Search String: Heater
3. GARPTS ID (mention GeM Availability Report ID): GEM/GARPTS/08042026/9CIJL1DGL1SU
4. Categories to which notification was sent:
Category 1: Glass Air pre
Category 2: radiation
5. Undertaking:
I understand that the creation of a custom bid is an exceptional process and should only be used
when existing categories on GeM are not suitable for the required services.
I, undertake the following:
• I have conducted a thorough search string using the search string mentioned above and
determined that existing categories are not appropriate for the required goods/services.
• I have provided an accurate and detailed description of the required goods/services in section 1.
• I have selected the most relevant categories for notification in section 4.
• I am fully prepared to justify the need for a custom BID to GeM upon request.
breadcrumb: Undertaking for Creation of Custom Bid for Services required on GeM > 5 Undertaking:
